experience.title: B.S. in Informatics (Distinction)
experience.description:
Graduated with a 3.8/4.0 GPA, specializing in Software Engineering and Enterprise Systems Design with a strong academic emphasis on Data Structures and Discrete Structures.
Built advanced full-stack capstone projects utilizing Java, C#, and SQL, integrating core principles from Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Interaction Design, and responsive Web Design.
Inducted into the Hutton Honors College and recognized as a three-time recipient of the Indiana University Founders Scholar award for sustained academic excellence.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description:
Owned end-to-end frontend development and UI maintenance for InDepth Lite, a business-critical file-processing application utilized daily by 150+ data analysts across GM’s global analytics platform.
Spearheaded a comprehensive 3-month framework migration that successfully modernized 100% of legacy AngularJS components to enterprise Angular, drastically improving application performance and long-term maintainability.
Systematically diagnosed and resolved deep-rooted dependency bottlenecks and 15+ complex UI bugs, resulting in a snappier user experience and maintaining zero production downtime during deployment phases.

experience.title: Software Engineer I, Test Automation
experience.description:
Designed, developed, and deployed robust, scalable test automation frameworks built completely from the ground up utilizing Java and C#.
Targeted cross-platform backend data pipelines and PostgreSQL instances, successfully scaling automated test regression coverage from a legacy baseline of 30% to a comprehensive 85% across all enterprise backend integrations.
Neutralized recurring deployment risks and delivery bottlenecks, reducing manual QA testing overhead by 60% and shortening delivery cycles by 2 full days per development sprint.

experience.title: M.S. in Software Development
experience.description:
Completed a rigorous graduate curriculum focused on advanced software engineering methodologies, data structures, algorithm optimization, and secure web application architecture.
Deep-dived into advanced Enterprise Architecture patterns and core software design principles, including Creational, Structural, and Behavioral design patterns.
Developed a robust portfolio of engineering projects, focusing on optimizing complex business database schemas, writing advanced SQL performance-tuning scripts, and building distributed, reliable software systems using Python and Java.

experience.title: Software Engineer II
experience.description:
Architected and implemented enterprise-level automated testing frameworks within GM’s high-throughput DaaS (Data as a Service) ecosystem, driving Java and SpringBoot regression coverage to a resilient 90%.
Engineered secure, high-availability backend microservices and IMOS API integrations that directly support and drive daily operations for 500+ manufacturing plant power users.
Designed performance-optimized, reusable GraphQL query and mutation schemas to streamline frontend data fetching, while ensuring system stability and zero-downtime cluster configurations throughout a large-scale cloud migration to Red Hat OpenShift.
